props.name: disableContentPaddings
props.description: Removes the default padding from the content area.

props.name: disableFooterPaddings
props.description: Removes the default padding from the footer area.

props.name: disableHeaderPaddings
props.description: Removes the default padding from the header area.

props.name: fullHeight
props.description: Makes the item card stretch to fill the full height of its container.

props.name: highlighted
props.description: Specifies whether the item card is in highlighted state.

props.name: metadataAttributes
props.description: Specifies metadata for analytics in cards

props.name: onClick
props.description: Called when the user clicks on the item card.

props.name: variant
props.description:
Specifies the visual variant of the item card, which controls the border radius and padding.

- `default` - Uses container-level border radius and padding (larger).
- `embedded` - Uses compact border radius and padding (smaller).

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Actions to display in the item card header area, typically buttons or links.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Main content of the item card.

slots.name: description
slots.description: A description or subtitle displayed below the header.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Footer content displayed at the bottom of the item card.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Heading element of the item card. Use this to add a title or header text.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Icon content displayed next to the header.
